# Realistic GitHub CODEOWNERS.
# The catch-all comes first so more specific rules below win (last-match-wins).

* @acme/maintainers

# Ownership by source area.
/src/parser/ @acme/parser-team @alice
/src/public/ @api-team

# Documentation.
/docs/ @docs-team

# A very specific rule that overrides the parser directory rule.
/src/parser/tokenize.ts @tokenizer-guru

# Extension-based rule (slashless): every markdown file, anywhere.
*.md @docs-team

# Explicitly unowned generated output (matching rule, zero owners).
/generated/
